Finding Leads & Qualifying (Plug & Play)
Things to keep in mind:
For now, we’re JUST finding leads. We’re not diving deeper and collating more info
on their businesses or anything like that. That is done in the next step.
First we simply get the names of the leads, log them as a new potential deal in
PipeDrive and then build out their client information later.
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Method 1 - Lead Carrot:
This is a lead scraper that allows you to input a location and niche you’re looking for,
then it scrapes the internet to pull up as much info as possible.
There are a few other softwares that I use in conjunction to this, but they all cost
$100/pm+ and are more complicated. I share those with the Copy Paste Agency
students who are trying to scale to 7-Figs.
If your niche isn’t bog standard like ‘gym’ or ‘restaurant’ then you might need to get
little more creative with what you input the search as.
Lead Carrot is only $8 a month paid in full yearly. It’s a super affordable, aesthetic
lead scraper that me and my team have been using for as long as we can remember.
You can sign up HERE
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Method 2 - Google Directory:
Oldest method in the book, but that’s because it works. It’s not as quick and efficient
as something like Lead Carrot but it works very well nonetheless.
All you have to do is hop on over to Google and type in whatever niche you work
with and it’ll give you a list of all the ones closest to your area. Work your way
through the list, go on their website and get a feel for if they’re qualified. Always
avoid large chain places. Once you find a lead that looks qualified, just log it into your
PipeDrive.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 3 --

Finding Leads & Qualifying (Plug & Play)
Method 3 - Instagram Geotags:
One of the best ways to look for qualified leads is to let the leads qualify
THEMSELVES. This is super powerful because there are certain events that only
people within a certain niche go to, these people will geotag themselves at these
places.
There are conferences out there for restaurant owners, personal trainers, people in
real estate. Some of these events are paid and some are free.
For example, if you were looking to sign a watch dealer as a client… you could check
out the geotag for BaselWorld. If you’re trying to sign real estate agents, you could
look at 10X growth con.
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Method 4 - Facebook Groups:
Find a handful of groups on Facebook that contain your perfect niche. For example,
here are some good groups I found when I looked up ‘Real Estate Agents’ on
Facebook:
Join 8-10 of these groups, you’ll probably have to answer some questions and wait to
get accepted into some of these groups. Now you have to find the perfect potential
clients within this group. Find who the owners is by looking for it in their title.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 3 --

Finding Leads & Qualifying (Plug & Play)
HACK:
Go to the members section of a group.
Scroll all the way down so you have the entire list members in the group.
Press CMD + F (Mac, Chrome) and type in ‘Owner’ if you’re looking for the owner of a
restaurant, gym, dental practice, etc.
You can type in ‘Personal trainer’ if you’re just looking to find the personal trainers in
a gym group, type ‘Realtor’ or ‘Real Estate Agent’ to find a list of exclusively just the
realtors.
Now it’s time to send them friend requests, you can send 10 per day so this is a great
way to keep growing your Facebook profile with a full directory of business owners
perfect to your niche. Later down the line you can actually reach out to them.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
